positive: A whimsical, stylized geometric forest scene with bioluminescent glowing mushrooms and elegant, abstracted silhouettes of deer and rabbits. The art style should be inspired by mid-century modern illustration meets Art Nouveau, featuring sharp lines, flat planes of color, and strong depth through overlapping shapes. Use a vibrant color palette dominated by teal, mustard yellow, emerald green, and deep indigo, with the glowing elements providing pops of electric cyan light. The composition must be highly centralized and symmetrical, perfect for a chest print, designed with a circular border element for framing. Clean vector art aesthetic, high contrast, intricate detail, forest fantasy, decorative, print-friendly.
